description_long: This humanoid robot features a robust, armored exoskeleton with a dark metallic finish and angular, segmented plating covering its entire body. The head is helmet-like, lacking visible facial features, and is flanked by two prominent vertical structures extending from the upper back, possibly functioning as sensors or equipment mounts. The arms and legs are proportionate and muscular, with articulated joints at the shoulders, elbows, hips, knees, and ankles, suggesting a high degree of mobility. The hands are detailed with individual fingers, and the feet are broad and reinforced, likely for stability. The overall design is utilitarian and militaristic, with visible seams and mechanical details hinting at internal actuators and power systems. The surface is matte with subtle wear, indicating use in rugged urban environments.
description: A heavily armored, dark metallic humanoid robot with a helmeted head, reinforced limbs, and two large vertical structures on its back. Its design is utilitarian and robust, suited for urban deployment.
description_view_0: Front view shows the helmeted head, broad chest armor, outstretched arms, and the two large vertical structures rising from the back.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head, the thickness of the back-mounted structures, and the layered armor on the limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the full extent of the back-mounted structures, segmented back armor, and the symmetrical design of the legs and arms.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the head, arm, and leg armor, as well as the depth of the back structures.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with arms extended outward to the sides, legs straight and slightly apart, head facing forward, and torso erect.
attribute_clothing_style: No separate clothing; the robot is covered in integrated, angular armor plating with a utilitarian, military aesthetic.
attribute_facial_features: The face is helmet-like with no visible eyes, mouth, or nose; it is smooth and featureless, lacking expressive elements or display screens.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms and legs have visible hinge and rotary joints at shoulders, elbows, hips, knees, and ankles; hands have articulated fingers, suggesting a wide range of motion.
